steps.title: Fresh Selection
steps.desc: Sweet, golden stalks hand-picked from the fields. That familiar crunch when the vendor selects the finest canes.

steps.title: The Press
steps.desc: The mechanical press groans to life, crushing the stalks with rhythmic force. Juice flows like liquid gold onto the collection tray.

steps.title: Chill & Serve
steps.desc: Ice shards dropped in with a satisfying clink. The vendor hands you the glass with a smile - it's an art form.

steps.title: First Sip
steps.desc: That first sip hits different. Pure, natural, no chemicals. The sweetness, the freshness, the memories it brings.

sensory.label: See
sensory.desc: Golden liquid flowing into glass containers

sensory.label: Hear
sensory.desc: The mechanical crush, the satisfying clink of ice

sensory.label: Smell
sensory.desc: Fresh, natural sweetness of pure sugarcane

sensory.label: Taste
sensory.desc: Clean, pure, naturally sweet with no additives
